{{Quote|Ah well. Notify Fleet Intelligence: looks like Oplovis is coming out to play.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Vernan (general)|Vernan]]|<ref name="RASB" />}}
The '''Oplovis Sector Fleet''', also known simply as '''Oplovis Fleet''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]], assigned to the defense of [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The fleet was stationed at [[Harrod's Planet]].<ref name="RASB" /><ref name="TCSWE-Oplovis sector" />

==History==
The Oplovis Fleet fought during the [[Battle in the Yuvern system]] while assigned to the [[Yuvern system/Legends|Yuvern system]], where they sustained damage and were forced to retreat. Following the battle, its [[Unidentified Imperial admiral (Oplovis Fleet)|admiral]] was removed and a new [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] was personally appointed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Eight months later, the fleet was [[Battle of the Generis system|ambushed]] and defeated by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] fleet in the [[Generis system/Legends|Generis system]].<ref name="RASB" /><ref name="TCSWE-Oplovis sector" />
